texto: Until now, I felt like I had no real purpose in life, I found myself just wandering through the day to day tasks that have no consequence or interpretation to the kind of woman I am. These emotions have been with me for a number of years now, and I often wonder if it has to do with the death of my mother and the suspicious circumstances in which she passed. What is it about Chas that brings new substance to my life?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a J.A. Heron: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Until now, I felt like I had no real purpose in life, I found myself just wandering through the d…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, erotic, suspense-thriller pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e suspense-thriller.
